text.title: AC Quality Rubric — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the per-AC scoring record + story-level decision shape. Agent or refinement-meeting facilitator producing rubric output must satisfy this.

forbidden.pattern: dimension_scores total >= 10 with one dimension at 0 (must still reject per r2)
decision=rewrite-required without a rewrite_proposal AND fix_pattern_id
rewrite_proposal containing implementation language (file paths, framework names, column names) per r5
AC text passed through scoring with zero dimension scores recorded (rubric not actually run)
score record produced without ac_text included verbatim (cannot audit later)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Split a single multi-outcome AC into multiple ACs at the rubric step IF the scope dimension scores 0 due to multiple outcomes.
Merge two near-identical low-scoring ACs into one rewritten AC IF they describe the same outcome.
Reference an existing AC pattern (e.g., "standard auth-flow AC") instead of re-scoring it — but only after the pattern itself has been scored once.

list.item: Every AC has a dimension_scores object with 7 dimensions present
Total computed correctly = sum of 7 dimensions
No dimension scores 0 in any passing AC (r2)
Every rewrite-required AC has both rewrite_proposal AND fix_pattern_id
Rewrite proposals contain no implementation references (r5)
